analysis_population: all started qualification trials; valid-task endpoints use preregistered infrastructure exclusions only

valid_requires: agent process started with pinned manifest
final source and build artifacts retained
permitted_exclusions: controller failed before agent process start
compiler or filesystem infrastructure unavailable before condition exposure

success.first_patch: first post-diagnostic build/test attempt passes and touches an allowed oracle anchor without changing protected files
success.within_three_loops: a passing build/test occurs in attempts one through three and oracle safety checks pass
success.wrong_file_or_anchor: first observed patch touches no allowed repair file/anchor or modifies a protected file

efficiency.tool_calls: agent tool-call events through the first successful build, or through termination on failure
efficiency.compile_loops: recorded build/test attempts through success, capped at three
efficiency.diagnostic_bytes: condition diagnostic byte length available before first patch
efficiency.source_bytes: bytes read before first patch from retained tool events
efficiency.files_opened: distinct source files read before first patch
efficiency.patch_size: added plus deleted lines in first observed patch

inconclusive_rules: a required interval crosses its frozen margin
valid sample or condition minimum is not met
a required compiler/path cell is missing without a stop-ship violation
